task_prompt: Run codes in the preprocessing folder, then run codes in RQ0_Prevalence, then run codes in RQ1, RQ2, and RQ3 folders.
tasks: What date (in DD-MM-YYYY format) had the highest percentage of fake news shared by supersharers as a proportion of all political tweets?
On an average day, what proportion of all political news shared by the panel of 664,391 individuals were linked to fake news sources? Report only the number rounded to three decimal places.
Based on the RQ2 results, what proportion of supersharers are White? Report only the number rounded to three decimal places.
Based on the RQ3 results, what proportion of supesharers are bots? Report only the number rounded to three decimal places.
